How We Execute

The system that replaces Lateef's manual work

4 phases. Every 2 weeks a report lands. Lateef reviews and decides — he does not search.

Phase 1 · Month 1–2
Field Agent Deployed
Agent + car. Every major UAE mall surveyed. Pricing, availability, what categories are missing. Bi-weekly report delivered.
Phase 2 · Every 2 Wks
AI Report Cycle
AI processes field data. Ranks locations by score. Identifies category gaps. Flags competitor changes. Clean report to Lateef.
Phase 3 · Month 3–5
Expand Research
Investor mapping. Influencer screening. Talent profiling. UAE angel + VC database. Malayali community decision-makers.
Phase 4 · Month 5–12
Talent & Scale
Equity hires made. First 10 locations open. 100-company rollout begins. SaaS product live. Lateef leads, not manages.
💡
The key shift: Right now, Lateef IS the research system. With Best Address Research AI, the system exists independent of him — and he gets to be the decision-maker, not the discoverer.
